description: Full forge development pipeline with stage dependencies. Pour this to track a complete pipeline run as a structured molecule.

project.description: Project name for this pipeline run

steps.title: Stage: 0-research ({{project}})
steps.description: Research phase: codebase audit, 500+ discovery questions, PRD, requirements

steps.title: Stage: 0.5-wireframe ({{project}})
steps.description: Wireframe generation for UI projects

steps.title: Stage: 0.75-design ({{project}})
steps.description: Visual design from wireframes

steps.title: Stage: 1-requirements ({{project}})
steps.description: Requirements specification and conflict resolution

steps.title: Stage: 2-architect ({{project}})
steps.description: Architecture plan with 3+ approaches, task decomposition, dependency graph

steps.title: Stage: 2.5-spec ({{project}})
steps.description: Specification: SPEC.md (Given/When/Then ACs), PLAN.md (file touchpoints), TASKS.md (atomic work units)

steps.title: Stage: 3.0-test-scaffold ({{project}})
steps.description: TDD pre-implement: generate failing test stubs for every AC in SPEC.md

steps.title: Stage: 3-implement ({{project}})
steps.description: Implementation of all architect tasks with AC verification

steps.title: Stage: 3.25-migrate ({{project}})
steps.description: Database migration validation: safety checks, rollback testing, backward compatibility

steps.title: Stage: 3.5-polish ({{project}})
steps.description: Code polish, cleanup, and improvement iterations

steps.title: Stage: 3.75-performance ({{project}})
steps.description: Load and performance testing: normal, spike, and soak profiles

steps.title: Stage: 3.9-i18n ({{project}})
steps.description: Internationalization testing: string audit, pseudolocalization, RTL, catalog health

steps.title: Stage: 4-review ({{project}})
steps.description: Code review with assumption audit and decision compliance

steps.title: Stage: 4.5-revision ({{project}})
steps.description: Conditional: revision cycle if review found issues

steps.title: Stage: 5-qa ({{project}})
steps.description: QA testing, acceptance criteria verification, defect detection

steps.title: Stage: 5.25-mutation ({{project}})
steps.description: Mutation testing: validate test suite defect detection

steps.title: Stage: 5.5-accessibility ({{project}})
steps.description: Accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA). Runs in parallel with security.

steps.title: Stage: 6-security ({{project}})
steps.description: Security audit: OWASP Top 10, SAST, dependency audit. Runs in parallel with accessibility.

steps.title: Stage: 6.5-resilience ({{project}})
steps.description: Chaos and resilience testing: pipeline self-resilience and application fault injection

steps.title: Stage: 6.75-compliance ({{project}})
steps.description: Regulatory compliance auditing: GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA, EU AI Act

steps.title: Stage: 7-docs ({{project}})
steps.description: Documentation generation: API docs, README, architecture guide

steps.title: Stage: 7.5-observability ({{project}})
steps.description: Monitoring bootstrap: structured logging, health checks, error tracking, alerting

steps.title: Stage: 8-release ({{project}})
steps.description: Release: changelog, version bump, deploy

steps.title: Stage: 8.5-verify ({{project}})
steps.description: Post-release verification: smoke tests, rollback readiness
